When this guidance applies:

1. Read `.github/skills/ux-design-review/SKILL.md`.
2. Follow its workflow, checklist, and output format.
3. Load linked files from the same skill bundle before making changes.

When to use:

Review user experience for flows, information architecture, heuristics, content clarity, and loading/empty/error states. Use when evaluating wireframes, PRs that change navigation, onboarding, forms, dashboards, or when users report confusion or drop-off.
